---
title: '2013'
date: '2013-02-08T12:14:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7064155984140821466'
blogger_filename: '/2013/02/2013.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Prophecy'
---

<div><br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/grace-2013-ac8c4bdb1abb.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="204" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/grace-2013-9de6f5d2115a.jpg" width="640" /></a></div><div><br /></div><div>2013 Word from The Lord through Kenneth Copeland</div><div><div>Received August 17, 2012</div><div><br /></div><div>2013 IS A YEAR OF GREAT GRACE.</div><div><br /></div><div>Stay where you are. Stay steady.</div><div>Why? Your greatest blessing ever is at hand.</div><div>No one can stop My plan for you. It is a blessed plan.</div><div>Stay in My Word. Stay strong in faith.</div><div>Insist on walking in My commandment of love.</div><div>No devil. No government. No man can curse what I have blessed.</div><div>Believe that. Know that. You belong to Me--not the world.</div><div>We will carry out the blessing plan together.</div><div>I am teaching you grace. Keep it on your mind throughout 2013 and beyond.</div><div>Never, ever let it go.</div><div>The thing that I can do that is exceeding abundantly above all you can ask</div><div>or think is to make all grace abound towards you.</div><div>And that is what is happening for you and for your country right now.</div><div>Be blessed.</div><div>Enjoy My grace.</div><div>It is yours.</div></div>
